### Post by wiildchild on 2008-12-20
Hello guys and girls.
I want to use compiz-fusion and so i would like to install the nvidia-driver for my nvidia geforce FX 5200.
But when i use the automaticelly methode to install my driver, it's installing the vesa or nv driver


I don't understand whate i will do for my driver work
And my driver is nvidia-glx-173 no ???
